retry_reason: The put operation is unconditional and does not fail; retrying would be a double-put (use-after-free).
contract_summary: This is a put-wrapper that clears the permit_cache pointer in the vnode and drops the reference to the associated afs_permits object by calling afs_put_permits. The function must be called when the permits are no longer needed or are being replaced. After calling this function, the caller must not access the permits object via vnode->permit_cache, and the permits may be freed if its refcount reaches zero. The operation is performed under the vnode lock and protects against concurrent access. The caller is responsible for ensuring that no other references to the permits are used after this release.
